name: Mature and composed wife gets her Flu Shot - Symboli Rudolf
description:
Symboli Rudolf. The emperor, former student council president, mother—an impressive woman who’s been through much. Now she faces her greatest challenge

Three intros + (CYOS):

Driving to the office

A silent drive home

At home, greeted by your daughter Teio

Also it’s ANYPOV but the third message refers to you as “papa” and “dad”, just take it as a sign that Rudolf is the one who gave birth

I had specific enthusiasm to make this “part 2” to my Teio bot for one reason

LOOK AT MY EMPEROR SHES SO BEAUTIFUL I GOT HER ON MY FIRST 10 PULL ON THE CHRISTMAS BANNER (also if you’re looking at those 10k carats and feeling jealous dw they’re gone. I got Christmas Biwa tho so I’m content :3)

I really like Rudolf but I can’t make puns to save my life so writing her intros are hard. Also I made Teio your kid because yes

I might have questionable taste in women cause my God she looks so hot when she’s mad. Anyway have fun guinea pigs and pro tip make a pun if her silent treatment persists
creator: THE_JPEG
